resultList.dtldesc: Discover a sophisticated living opportunity in the thriving environs of Gurgaon with this 3 BHK apartment located in Godrej Vrikshya, a project designed for modern families seeking comfort, style and connectivity. The home is ideally positioned to offer a balanced lifestyle of convenience, contemporary amenities and potential for future appreciation - an attractive proposition for discerning buyers.::::Property Specifications::::This residence offers a super built-up area of 1,948 sq. ft and is situated on the 19th floor of a 26-storey tower. The apartment boasts three spacious bedrooms and three bathrooms, along with three balconies, providing generous space and ample daylight. The unit comes semi-furnished, giving you flexibility to customise interiors to your personal taste. Facing east, this home benefits from pleasant morning light, which enhances the living ambience. One covered parking space is allocated to the apartment, adding to its practicality for residents with a vehicle. The building is served by four lifts - supporting ease of movement across floors - and the construction status is under construction which implies the apartment may be part of a relatively newer phase within the project. Essential services such as 24-hour water supply and reliable electricity (with rare power cuts) ensure smooth daily living.::::Facilities::::As part of a premium residential project, the property enjoys access to comprehensive facilities that cater to modern lifestyles. The building structure supports at least one additional floor for potential future development, signalling thoughtful architectural planning. While the apartment itself is semi-furnished, the overall project design offers scope for further customisation and personalisation. The provision of four lifts ensures convenient vertical mobility, and inclusion of a covered parking slot adds to resident convenience. Utility services like continuous water supply and stable electricity, along with a well-maintained common infrastructure, contribute to a comfortable living environment.::::Locality::::Located in Sector 103, near the Dwarka Expressway, Godrej Vrikshya enjoys strategic connectivity to major parts of Gurgaon and the National Capital Region. The area benefits from easy access to commercial zones, educational institutions, hospitals and retail establishments, which supports a well-rounded urban lifestyle. As a modern township, the project is part of a planned development characterised by green open spaces, resort-style amenities, and a secure gated community atmosphere. The proximity to transport routes enhances commuting convenience for working professionals, while the growing infrastructure around the locality promises long-term value. The blend of connectivity, social infrastructure and thoughtful planning makes this apartment a compelling option for families or individuals seeking a contemporary, well-connected home in Gurgaon.
